glosses.ja: 持ち上げる; 上げる

sentences.target: Je soulève doucement la boîte du sol.
sentences.reading: /ʒə sulɛv dusmɑ̃ la bwat dy sɔl/

translations.fr: Je soulève doucement la boîte du sol.
translations.ipa: /ʒə sulɛv dusmɑ̃ la bwat dy sɔl/
translations.en: I gently lift the box from the floor.
translations.es: Levanto suavemente la caja del suelo.
translations.de: Ich hebe die Schachtel vorsichtig vom Boden hoch.
translations.it: Sollevo delicatamente la scatola da terra.
translations.ko: 나는 바닥에서 상자를 조심스럽게 들어 올린다.
translations.zh-Hans: 我轻轻把箱子从地上抬起。
translations.yue: 我輕輕咁喺地下拎起個紙箱。
translations.ru: Я аккуратно поднимаю коробку с пола.
translations.pt: Levanto suavemente a caixa do chão.
translations.he: אני מרים בעדינות את הקופסה מהרצפה.
translations.vi: Tôi nhẹ nhàng nhấc chiếc hộp lên khỏi sàn.
translations.nl: Ik til de doos voorzichtig van de vloer op.
translations.uk: Я обережно піднімаю коробку з підлоги.
translations.hu: Óvatosan felemelem a dobozt a padlóról.
translations.hi: मैं धीरे से डिब्बा फर्श से उठाता हूँ.
translations.el: Σηκώνω απαλά το κουτί από το πάτωμα.
translations.nb: Jeg løfter esken forsiktig fra gulvet.
translations.id: Saya mengangkat kotak dari lantai dengan hati-hati.
translations.sv: Jag lyfter försiktigt lådan från golvet.
translations.ro: Ridic ușor cutia de pe podea.
translations.da: Jeg løfter forsigtigt kassen op fra gulvet.
translations.ja: 私は床から箱をそっと持ち上げる。

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun, 1st person singular; functions as the subject of the verb.
Main verb in present indicative, 1st person singular; transitive, taking a direct object.
Adverb of manner modifying the verb, indicating the way the action is performed.
Definite article, feminine singular; determiner of the noun 'boîte'.
Common noun, feminine singular; direct object of 'soulève'.
Preposition 'de' contracted with the definite article 'le' (de + le → du); introduces the complement 'sol'.
Common noun, masculine singular; object of the preposition 'du'.

sentences.target: Tu peux soulever ce carton, s’il te plaît.
sentences.reading: /ty pø suləve sə kaʁtɔ̃ sil tə plɛ/

translations.fr: Tu peux soulever ce carton, s’il te plaît.
translations.ipa: /ty pø suləve sə kaʁtɔ̃ sil tə plɛ/
translations.en: Can you lift this box, please.
translations.yue: 唔該幫手抬起呢個紙箱。
translations.vi: Vui lòng nhấc chiếc hộp này lên.
translations.hu: Kérlek, emeld fel ezt a dobozt.
translations.el: Σε παρακαλώ, σήκωσε αυτό το κουτί.
translations.sv: Var snäll och lyft den här lådan.
translations.fi: Ole hyvä ja nosta tämä laatikko.
translations.ja: この箱を持ち上げてください。

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun, 2nd person singular; subject of 'peux'.
Modal auxiliary in present indicative, 2nd person singular; selects an infinitive ('soulever').
Infinitive verb; complement of the modal 'peux'.
Demonstrative determiner, masculine singular; modifies 'carton'.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object of 'soulever'.
Subordinating conjunction 'si' (if) with elision before 'il'; introduces the courtesy formula 's’il te plaît'.
Clitic pronoun, 2nd person singular (indirect object: 'to you'); complements 'plaît'.
Main verb, 3rd person singular present; in the set phrase 's’il te plaît' meaning 'please'.

sentences.target: Elle soulève le couvercle de la marmite.
sentences.reading: /ɛl sulɛv lə kuvɛʁkl də la maʁmit/

translations.fr: Elle soulève le couvercle de la marmite.
translations.ipa: /ɛl sulɛv lə kuvɛʁkl də la maʁmit/
translations.en: She lifts the lid of the pot.
translations.es: Ella levanta la tapa de la olla.
translations.de: Sie hebt den Deckel des Topfes an.
translations.it: Lei solleva il coperchio della pentola.
translations.pt: Ela levanta a tampa da panela.
translations.vi: Cô ấy nhấc nắp nồi lên.
translations.nl: Ze tilt de deksel van de pan op.
translations.hi: वह बर्तन का ढक्कन उठाती है.
translations.el: Αυτή σηκώνει το καπάκι της κατσαρόλας.
translations.ja: 彼女は鍋のふたを持ち上げる。

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun, 3rd person singular feminine; subject of 'soulève'.
Main verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular; transitive.
Definite article, masculine singular; determiner of 'couvercle'.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object of 'soulève'.
Preposition introducing a nominal complement ('la marmite').
Definite article, feminine singular; determiner of 'marmite'.
Common noun, feminine singular; object of the preposition 'de'.

sentences.target: Nous soulevons la valise pour la peser.
sentences.reading: /nu suləvɔ̃ la valiz puʁ la pəze/

translations.fr: Nous soulevons la valise pour la peser.
translations.ipa: /nu suləvɔ̃ la valiz puʁ la pəze/
translations.en: We lift the suitcase to weigh it.
translations.de: Wir heben den Koffer hoch, um ihn zu wiegen.
translations.ko: 우리는 여행가방을 달기 위해 들어 올린다.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们把行李提起来称重。
translations.yue: 我哋為咗稱重而舉起個行李箱。
translations.ru: Мы поднимаем чемодан, чтобы взвесить его.
translations.he: אנחנו מרימים את המזוודה כדי לשקול אותה.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi nhấc chiếc vali lên để cân nó.
translations.nl: We tillen de koffer op om hem te wegen.
translations.uk: Ми піднімаємо валізу, щоб зважити її.
translations.hi: हम सूटकेस को तौलने के लिए उठाते हैं.
translations.el: Σηκώνουμε τη βαλίτσα για να τη ζυγίσουμε.
translations.nb: Vi løfter kofferten for å veie den.
translations.sv: Vi lyfter resväskan för att väga den.
translations.ro: Ridicăm valiza ca să o cântărim.
translations.da: Vi løfter kufferten for at veje den.
translations.fi: Nostamme matkalaukun, jotta voimme punnita sen.
translations.ja: 私たちは重さを量るためにスーツケースを持ち上げる。

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun, 1st person plural; subject of 'soulevons'.
Main verb, present indicative, 1st person plural; transitive.
Definite article, feminine singular; determiner of 'valise'.
Common noun, feminine singular; direct object of 'soulevons'.
Subordinating conjunction introducing a purpose clause with an infinitive ('la peser').
Clitic direct object pronoun (feminine singular), referring to 'la valise'; placed before the infinitive 'peser'.
Infinitive verb; complement of 'pour', with preceding clitic object 'la'.

app_payload.word_ja: 持ち上げる; 上げる
jp: Je soulève doucement la boîte du sol.
Tu peux soulever ce carton, s’il te plaît.
Elle soulève le couvercle de la marmite.
Nous soulevons la valise pour la peser.
fu: /ʒə sulɛv dusmɑ̃ la bwat dy sɔl/
/ty pø suləve sə kaʁtɔ̃ sil tə plɛ/
/ɛl sulɛv lə kuvɛʁkl də la maʁmit/
/nu suləvɔ̃ la valiz puʁ la pəze/
fr: Je soulève doucement la boîte du sol.
Tu peux soulever ce carton, s’il te plaît.
Elle soulève le couvercle de la marmite.
Nous soulevons la valise pour la peser.
ipa: /ʒə sulɛv dusmɑ̃ la bwat dy sɔl/
/ty pø suləve sə kaʁtɔ̃ sil tə plɛ/
/ɛl sulɛv lə kuvɛʁkl də la maʁmit/
/nu suləvɔ̃ la valiz puʁ la pəze/
en: I gently lift the box from the floor.
Can you lift this box, please.
She lifts the lid of the pot.
We lift the suitcase to weigh it.
